name.ja: <ruby>二つの心<rt>マインド・シャッフル</rt></ruby>

text.en: During either player's turn: You can add 1 monster that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness" from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Mind Shuffle" once per turn. When your opponent activates a card or effect: You can return 1 Level 7 or higher monster you control to the hand; Special Summon 1 monster with a different name from your hand that mentions "Ritual of Light and Darkness", ignoring its Summoning conditions. You cannot activate these effects of "Mind Shuffle" in the same Chain.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名的①效果1回合仅可使用1次，①②的效果不可在同一连锁上发动。①：在自己・对手回合中可以发动。从牌组将1只记载有“光与暗的仪式”卡名的怪兽加入手牌。然后，挑选自己的1张手牌舍弃。②：对手发动卡的效果时，将自己场上的1只等级7以上的怪兽放回手牌可以发动。从手牌将1只卡名与所放回怪兽不同的、记载有“光与暗的仪式”卡名的怪兽无视召唤条件特殊召唤。
